title: juniperus sphaerica var. neaboriensis
intro: Juniperus sphaerica var. neaboriensis, also known as Neobor juniper or New Zealand juniper, is a variety of the juniperus sphaerica plant, which is a type of evergreen conifer native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of terpenes and other compounds. The health benefits of Neobor juniper include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Neobor juniper is often used as a tea, infusion, or oil, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
